75562.subject: Vitalik Outlines a 'Lean Ethereum' Protocol Overhaul
75562.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Vitalik](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/vitalik-buterin-outlines-lean-ethereum-roadmap-a-three-to-four-year-protocol-overhaul)**[ outlines a 'Lean Ethereum' roadmap](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/vitalik-buterin-outlines-lean-ethereum-roadmap-a-three-to-four-year-protocol-overhaul)

* **[Strategy](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/strategy-sells-3-588-bitcoin-for-216m-to-fund-dividend-payments)**[ sells 3,588 BTC, first sale under $1.25B program](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/strategy-sells-3-588-bitcoin-for-216m-to-fund-dividend-payments)

* **[Ripple](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/ripple-secures-full-mica-license-completing-eu-compliance)**[ secures a full MiCA license](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/ripple-secures-full-mica-license-completing-eu-compliance)

* **[Inside DTCC's Move to Stellar](https://thedefiant.io/education/explainers/dtcc-stellar-tokenization-dtc-custodied-assets-explainer)**[ (Partner)](https://thedefiant.io/education/explainers/dtcc-stellar-tokenization-dtc-custodied-assets-explainer)

* **[JPMorgan](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/jpmorgan-s-jltxx-tokenized-money-market-fund-aum-grows-250-in-a-month-on-ethereum)**['s tokenized MMF grows AUM 250% in a month ](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/jpmorgan-s-jltxx-tokenized-money-market-fund-aum-grows-250-in-a-month-on-ethereum)

* **[BonkDAO](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/bonkdao-treasury-drained-of-20m-via-malicious-proposal)**['s treasury is drained of $20M](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/bonkdao-treasury-drained-of-20m-via-malicious-proposal)

* **[Cosmos Labs Acquires Mintscan and Team](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/cosmos-labs-acquires-mintscan-cosmos-korea-expansion)**[ (Partner)](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/cosmos-labs-acquires-mintscan-cosmos-korea-expansion)

Vitalik Buterin wants to rebuild Ethereum's core one more time. Over the weekend he laid out "Lean Ethereum," a three-to-four-year overhaul he framed as the network's third major protocol iteration since the 2022 Merge.

The plan pushes a multi-year simplification of the base protocol, aimed at keeping Ethereum's core small and verifiable as scaling moves to layer-2s. The pitch bets that Ethereum's edge is durability: a base layer simple enough to stay stable and outlast competitors while execution scales on L2s. 

**Read more below!**

Caption:

## Strategy's $1.2B Bitcoin Sale Is... a Rounding Error?

With Strategy now actually selling — 3,588 BTC for $216M today — the question is whether it moves the market. **Scott Melker** [do

75560.subject: 🟪 The Consumer Wagering Thesis
75560.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9f199753-ca31-4e3d-9435-5e12896ecff5/BD_NL_Banner_Heading.png?t=1781793903)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e60d7cde-4250-41f8-9443-28ed51b80560/divider_transparent.png?t=1774649182)
Caption: 

The 0xResearch crew is taking over The Breakdown today! [Shaunda](https://x.com/shaundadevens) and [Kunal](https://x.com/Kunallegendd) have your market update, as well as a look at prediction markets, where June volumes hit another all-time high. World Cup trading pushed sports further into the center of the category.

If you enjoy, you can subscribe to the [0xResearch newsletter](https://blockworks.com/newsletter/0xresearch) (shhh, we won’t tell Byron!) 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e60d7cde-4250-41f8-9443-28ed51b80560/divider_transparent.png?t=1774649182)
Caption: 

# Market Update

Crypto traded mixed over the past 24 hours, with BTC up 0.83% and modestly ahead of traditional benchmarks, including Nasdaq 100 +0.32%, S&P 500 +0.19%, and gold +0.13%. Leadership was concentrated in monetization and venue-linked baskets, with Buyback Leaders +2.59%, Exchange Tokens +2.58%, Launchpads +1.86%, Perps +1.82% and DeFi +1.65%. Meanwhile, higher-duration and ecosystem beta lagged, with L2s -1.75%, Gaming -1.33%, and Solana Eco -1.26%.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/30dfd329-a511-4591-9ce4-69135818ee37/image.png?t=1783367753)
Caption: 

Within perps, LIT was the standout, up roughly 12% on the day, driven by Robinhood’s Lighter integration. The key catalyst is distribution and incentives: eligible users in selected jurisdictions can now access Lighter perpetual futures directly inside Robinhood Wallet, while Lighter has committed $11M of LIT rewards to the Robinhood community. Trades through Robinhood Wallet earn 2x points versus 1x on Lighter’s own web app, with those points converting into LIT from the reward pool. Implementation details remain slightly unclear; for example, Lighter still needs to build its own app on Robinhood Chain and long-term fee economics are not fully defined. Nevertheless, the positive read-through is that the perpetuals market — especially as it expands into RWAs — is large enough for more than one scaled player.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c2fc46a8-096a-4323-8d31-3ca3baf2541b/image.png?t=1783367753)
Caption: 

_— __[Shaunda](https://x.com/shaundadevens)_

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e60d7cde-42

75559.subject: Claude has cheat codes
75559.body:
The Atlas

Автор: GenAI Works


Автор: GenAI Works

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/claude-has-cheat-codes-genai-works-w1o0f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BnNiGWyDeR9uHimp13fffIQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2Vpjcp9P6Fyck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr9mlzn9~j8-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr9mlzn9-j8
  
Welcome back! AI tools are getting more powerful, but the real advantage is starting to come from how well you structure the work around them. This edition covers reusable Claude commands, a repo documentation tool built for coding agents, Stanford’s new research on trainable agent memory and a practical Microsoft 365 Copilot playbook.  In today's Atlas Newsletter: Claude has shortcuts most people never use: Turn repeated prompts into reusable commands for writing, reasoning, feedback and building. Every developer needs a repo that explains itself: OpenWiki generates repo docs, updates agent files and opens daily PRs to keep documentation current. Memory is the next skill agents need to learn: Stanford’s AUTOMEM trains agents to record, retrieve and organize memory with 2x to 4x benchmark gains. How to use Copilot like a power user: Use Copilot inside Word, Excel, PowerPoint and Chat with the right file, task and output format. PS: Want to collaborate with the biggest GTM engine and distribution moat for AI companies? You can feature your tool with us and reach millions. Claude has shortcuts most people never use  Most people are using Claude like a blank chat box. That is an expensive mistake. They rewrite the same instructions every day. → “Make it more human.” → “Think deeper.” → “Give me the short version.” → “Challenge this idea.” → “Turn this into something visual.” Same request. Same friction. Same wasted minutes. Claude can do a lot more when you turn your best instructions into reusable slash commands. Think of them as custom shortcuts for different modes of thinking, writing and building. Type one command. Claude knows the role, the output style, the level of depth and the job you want done. 10 Claude commands worth saving today: → /godmode: Use this when your idea feels too safe. It pushes Claude into bigger creative territory. Better for campaign angles, product ideas, content hooks, launch concepts and anything that needs more imagination. Best prompt style: “/godmode Give me 20 bold angles for this idea. Push beyond the obvious and make each one specific enough to use.” → /ghost: Use this when Claude sounds too polished or robotic. It makes the writing feel more natural, more human and closer to how people actually write online. Best prompt style: “/ghost Rewrite this like a sharp founder wrote it after 2 coffees. Keep it clear, specific and human.” → /a

75558.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Strategy sells $216 million of bitcoin
75558.body:
Vitalik Buterin proposes 'Extremely Lean' Ethereum | Ripple secures full MiCA CASP authorization for crypto services across 30 EEA countries | Bernstein holds 'ambitious' $150K year-end bitcoin target despite 54% drawdown | Nigel Farage failed to declare funding from crypto gambling figure convicted of fraud |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Kyle Baird

Presented by

BitGo ( https://www.bitgo.com/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Monday! With a light macro calendar this week, *21Shares* Head of Macro *Stephen Coltman* told The Block that markets will look to earnings season and next week's U.S. inflation report to determine whether *bitcoin* can build on its rebound above $60,000.

In today's newsletter, *Strategy* sells $216 million worth of *bitcoin* , *Vitalik Buterin* says *Ethereum's* next rebuild will rival *The Merge* , *Ripple* secures full *MiCA CASP* authorization, and more.

Meanwhile, *President Trump* says he's a " big crypto guy ( https://www.theblock.co/post/407312/president-trump-big-crypto-guy-distancing-familys-crypto-ventures?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) ," while distancing himself from his family's crypto ventures.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*💸 Strategy sells 3,588 BTC for $216 million, with total bitcoin holdings still underwater*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/407217/strategy-bitcoin-digital-energy?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Bitcoin* treasury firm *Strategy* sold 3,588 BTC for roughly $216 million last week, cutting its total holdings to 843,775 BTC, according to an *SEC* filing.

* The firm used the proceeds to fund preferred stock distributions and replenish its USD reserve to $2.55 billion as of July 5.
* Strategy's total holdings still sit underwater, carrying around $11.4 billion in paper losses on bitcoin bought at an average price of $74,476.
* The company also reported an $8.32 billion loss on digital assets for Q2 in the filing, driven almost entirely by an $8.31 billion unrealized loss.
* *JPMorgan* analysts recently warned the new sale policy introduces "avoidable two-way risk" by making Strategy both a buyer and seller, though *Bernstein* analysts argued its balance sheet makes forced selling unlikely.
* *MSTR* gained 21.1% last week to close Thursday at $100.77 followi
